# SL-ROBOTS-009: robots-missing-sitemap-directive

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-rule-docs.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Summary

robots.txt lacks a sitemap directive where policy requires one.

## Metadata

- Category: robots.txt and sitemap (robots-sitemap)
- Default severity: info
- Confidence: certain
- Scope: site
- Provider scope: core
- Version: 1.0.0

## Evidence Sources

- robots-txt

## Required Evidence

- site-contract
- robots-txt

## When This Triggers

Parse robots.txt and inspect Sitemap directives.

## False Positives

False positives are expected to be rare because this rule relies on
deterministic local evidence. Suppress only with a reason when the route
contract intentionally differs from the observed signal.

## How To Fix

Add Sitemap directive to robots.txt or update policy.

## Examples

Bad-case fixture reference:

- fixtures/robots/missing-sitemap-directive

Fixed direction:

- Add Sitemap directive to robots.txt or update policy.
